title: The Complete Drop Randomizer Mod
description: Every drop in the game is randomized from the full item registry. No cap, no curated list, fresh every world.
body:
# The Complete Drop Randomizer Mod

Built this because the datapack version had a 256 variant cap and a curated item list.

Every block, mob, fishing table, and archaeology site drops something random 
from the full item registry. Every obtainable item is in the pool. Break dirt, 
get an elytra. Kill a skeleton, get a cake. Dig up gravel and find an entire 
end city's worth of loot.

Fresh randomization on every world load.

## What's in this mod

- Full item registry in the pool
- Chest loot tables in the pool. Any drop source can pull the full contents of 
  an end city, nether fortress, buried treasure, or any other chest table.
- Fortune scales block drops, looting scales mob drops
- Config file to exclude items from the pool

## Commands

`/randomizer reroll` reshuffles everything mid-session. Ops level 2+ only.

## Config

`config/randomizer.json` is created on first run. Add item IDs to 
`extra_denylist` to exclude them from the pool. Takes effect on the next server 
start.
